message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-41-24_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should apply +30% high-enchantment surcharge for enchantment >= 5"
Expected: 145 G (Sword with enchantment 5: 100 base + 30 high-ench + 10 first-ins + 5 fee)
Current: 115 (no high-ench surcharge)
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-41-24_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

Add high-enchantment surcharge: when item.enchantment >= 5, add 30% of item base premium as surcharge. This is item-specific (added to itemSurcharges sum, similar to cursed).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal change to add the high-enchantment surcharge.

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-41-24_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

input.old_string: type Item = { type: string; cursed?: boolean };
input.new_string: type Item = { type: string; cursed?: boolean; enchantment?: number };

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-41-24_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

input.old_string:
const itemSurchargesFor = (items: Item[]): number =>
  items.reduce((total, item) => total + cursedSurchargeFor(item), 0);

content.text:
All 12 tests pass.

Final implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-41-24_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: Added `highEnchantmentSurchargeFor` helper that returns 30% of the item's base premium when `enchantment >= 5`, otherwise 0. Extended the `Item` type with optional `enchantment?: number`. Included it in the `itemSurchargesFor` reducer alongside `cursedSurchargeFor`.
- **Result**: All 12 tests now pass (13 todos remain).
- **Approach**: Mirrors the existing per-item surcharge pattern (cursed). Constants extracted (`HIGH_ENCHANTMENT_SURCHARGE_RATE = 0.3`, `HIGH_ENCHANTMENT_THRESHOLD = 5`) for clarity. Sword with enchantment 5: base 100, +30 high-ench surcharge → ceil(100 * 1.10 + 30 + 5) = 145. No optimization or refactoring beyond what was needed.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
